description:
Screen the following five chemicals using CAMEO Chemicals (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/) to determine if they are EPCRA Section 302 Extremely Hazardous Substances (EHS):

1. Phosgene (CAS 75-44-5)
2. Chlorine (CAS 7782-50-5)
3. Sulfuric Acid (CAS 7664-93-9)
4. Toluene (CAS 108-88-3)
5. Acetone (CAS 67-64-1)

For each chemical, identify its EHS status and the 'EPCRA 302 EHS TPQ' value. Create a CSV file named 'epcra_screening_report.csv' at /home/ga/Desktop/epcra_screening_report.csv with the headers: Chemical Name, EHS Status, TPQ (lbs). Use 'YES' or 'NO' for EHS Status. If a chemical is not an EHS, set the TPQ to 'N/A'.
